{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":55877,"duration_api_ms":51838,"num_turns":14,"result":"Step 1 complete. Here's what was done:

- **`GET /api/patient/schedule`** — fetches the active patient's prescriptions and returns a deduplicated array of `"HH:MM"` dose times as `{ ok: true, doseTimes: string[] }`.
- **`WebcamCapture`** — added a second `useEffect` (pill cam + auto mode only) that polls every 60s, calls the schedule endpoint, and fires `capture()` if the current time is within ±10 minutes of any dose time. A `lastScheduledCaptureRef` keyed by dose time string prevents duplicate captures within the same window.
- **`/cam/[kind]/page.tsx`** — pill cam now gets `auto={true}`; pantry stays `auto={false}`.","stop_reason":null,"session_id":"46d94a8b-7b78-4ec8-a5d4-29e16e9a2870","total_cost_usd":0.391462,"usage":{"input_tokens":12,"cache_creation_input_tokens":23236,"cache_read_input_tokens":351354,"output_tokens":2820,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":23236},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-sonnet-4-6":{"inputTokens":12,"outputTokens":2820,"cacheReadInputTokens":351354,"cacheCreationInputTokens":23236,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.391462,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"d77c5f11-632c-4089-9551-dd41a81fc29d"}
